mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deploy_record WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deploy_record (project_id, version_id, node_id, status, jar_name, log, start_time, end_time, create_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{versionId}, #{nodeId}, #{status}, #{jarName}, #{log}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createTime})
